creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

I’ve lived in Florida my whole life and just found this little hidden gem! 

Welcome to Marietta Museum of Art and Whimsy in Sarasota, Florida!

Have you been here?

#floridamuseums #whimsical #artmuseumsflorida #floridahiddengems

transcription.text: Fun things to do in Florida, part four. I've lived in Florida my whole life, and I only just discovered this hidden gem in Sarasota. This is Marietta Museum of Art and Whimsy. The founder, Marietta Lee, opened this museum in 2010, and her mission was to create an environment where people could relax and forget their problems. I can attest that she succeeded because I didn't stop smiling the whole time I was here. There's a huge collection of artwork, stained glass, ironworks, statues, and furniture from around the world that makes you feel like you've just stepped in to a whimsical fairy tale. The grounds are beautiful with large oak trees, orchids blooming everywhere, and butterfly gardens. They even have a dress-up area with fun hats, scarves, and funny glasses for pictures. There are interactive pieces for all to play with outdoors and places to sit and just enjoy the surroundings. You can even play a game of checkers or chess while listening to the fountains nearby. This museum is open from November through May on Thursdays, Fridays, and Saturdays from 1 p.m. to 4 p.m., and here's the best part. It's free admission. They only request a donation to keep things running if you are so inclined to do so. I absolutely recommend adding this museum to your list of places to check out while visiting Sarasota. It is a true hidden gem. Be sure to save this post and send it to someone you would want to visit here with.
